divergence: the camera was never invented — weddings hire sketch artists, driver's licenses carry portraits, and vacations end at the easel
story_angle: consumer report reviewing the apocalypse's amenities, with star rating
headline: Great Documentation Collapse Sparks National Sketchpad Shortage
deck: Charcoal tolls draw eye-rolling as bureaucratic delays stretch ID lines into eternity.
article:
The Great Documentation Collapse has triggered a nationwide run on sketch pads and charcoal, forcing citizens to redraw every license and permit by hand. Average DMV portrait waits now stretch twelve weeks; some applicants submit temporary self-portraits on parking tickets. Charcoal-ID fallout shelters, rated 3.5 stars, report a twelve-percent smudge failure rate in humid conditions.

Homeowners-association portrait queues have reached forty-seven days. Joyce Toinkle of Oakwood Estates, three months late on her ration-card renewal, says she is developing sketch fatigue and may switch to oils.

National-park entry now demands three distinct family portraits. Tom Bramble of Maple Grove complains that a simple weekend trip now requires hauling easels and paints for his children.

Sociologist Dr. Felicity Papert notes that without fresh charcoal likenesses, everyday identification becomes an open question—once her own supplies are replenished.
author: Clarence D. Report, Consumer Affairs Correspondent

oped.title: Hats Are the Real Crisis: Ban Them and Save Our Sketchpads
oped.author: Sir Reginald Monocle, PhD in Eternal Queues and Proprietor of BaldCap Emporium
oped.body: The so-called Great Documentation Collapse is a minor nuisance inflated by people who insist on wearing hats that hide their features. Sketch artists must then redraw every ear and follicle. A nationwide hat ban, enforced by immediate confiscation, would end the shortage and open fresh revenue for vendors of stylish head coverings. Discipline, not sympathy, suits this pencil-and-paper moment; the bureaucracy already knows best.

classifieds.text: Bulk sketchpads, smudged but serviceable—DMV lines got me selling the family stash at $75 a pad. Charcoal not included, serious buyers only.
Urgent: Apprentice charcoal sketchers needed for state ID offices. Must draw fast, ignore groaning crowds, and accept payment in extra erasers.
Lost my irreplaceable vacation sketchbook at the charcoal toll plaza during the documentation collapse. Reward: my last clean pad and eternal gratitude.
Desperate groom seeks last-minute sketch artist for courthouse wedding portraits—shortage has every easel booked through 2027. Will pay in rationed charcoal sticks.

panels.caption: 'Last sketchpad's gone,' mutters the DMV clerk. 'Collapse hit the supply at 9 a.m.'
Bureaucrat stamps the form: 'New rule. Every ID needs cross-hatching and a full-body study.'
Man at the head of the line: 'Fine. My license is now the back of this parking ticket.'

joke.setup: Following the sketchpad shortage, the DMV now requires applicants to supply their own artist for license photos.
joke.punchline: Most people just get the one who drew the last guy and end up with a face that screams 'I voted for this.'
joke.text: Following the sketchpad shortage, the DMV now requires applicants to supply their own artist for license photos. Most people just get the one who drew the last guy and end up with a face that screams 'I voted for this.'

sponsor_ads.headline: Beat the Shortage: Retinal Sketch Subscriptions
sponsor_ads.body: Traveling artists now render daily transactions directly onto the cornea—no paper, no backlog, just permanent personal ledgers.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Void where documentation collapses or optometrists object.

sponsor_ads.headline: DMV Sketch Amnesty Ends July 25
sponsor_ads.body: Submit one birch-bark self-portrait per household before the national reserve is gone; charcoal only, no erasures accepted.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Falsified jawlines will be artistically corrected at your expense.

sponsor_ads.headline: Pre-Drawn Vacations: Memories Without the Easel
sponsor_ads.body: Book a 2027 package and receive holiday panels already rendered on archival linen by overseas studios—shortage-proof and luggage-light.

sponsor_ads.headline: Graphite Bonds Now Trading
sponsor_ads.body: Invest in tomorrow’s sketchpad futures today; each certificate entitles the bearer to one future ream when the Documentation Collapse is officially declared over.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Past performance illustrated by unreliable narrators.

stories.headline: Stationery Distributors Impose Weekly Ration on Sketchpads
stories.deck: DMV bulk orders crowd out wedding planners and HOA portrait committees.
stories.article: Office-supply chains now cap sketchpad sales at two per customer after motor-vehicle offices locked in monthly orders of forty thousand pads. Charcoal mills in rural Pennsylvania added night shifts, yet trucking routes divert pallets to county clerks who refuse photocopies. Analysts forecast another eighteen-percent price jump before tax season requires still more drawings.

real_world_echo: Trump 50% tariff on Canadian imports, mirrored as 50% tariff on Canadian sketch pads and charcoal triggering the collapse treated as an everyday consumer inconvenience
